title: Wasted Nylium
description: Adds new ores,enchantments,armor,tool and more to the game
body:
This mod adds new ores like the Energyzed Ore,powerful tools like the energyzed pickaxe that mines in a 3x3 area,armor-Energyzed Armor and new enchatments to the game.The mod requires **FABRIC API** to work.If you want to experience new ores,enchantments,this is the mod for you.

![All tools in The Wasted Nylium mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/258a435437726010eacf07627cd24d2f3149e26b.png)
All the armor:

![All armor in The Wasted Nylium mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e5b939577e8a27de8d9cf690de43886706250f.png)
Each armor piece grants the player an effect when wearing

![Voidthyst Hummer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b95e6cb0de2eac8eb53f702f5cb68b4185a1930b.png)

![Voidthyst Cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b180bf604ba0368a7c4e87ed35a217fe88628a43.png)

These can be  found in Version 1.4.0
